title: Proper Portion Yogurt Taco Sauce
description: A creamy, tangy taco sauce made entirely from 0% Greek yogurt. Light, high-protein, and done in seconds — perfect drizzled over tacos, bowls, or wraps.
ingredients: 2 tsp lemon juice (or juice from 1/4 lemon)
instructions: Combine Greek yogurt, lemon juice, garlic powder, cumin, and smoked paprika in a small bowl.
Add water 1 tsp at a time until you reach your desired drizzle consistency.
Season with salt and hot sauce to taste.
Whisk until smooth and serve immediately.
notes: Macros are for the full single-bowl batch (1 serving). Uses 0% fat Greek yogurt for maximum protein with minimal calories. Great on chickpea tacos, fish tacos, or burrito bowls.
